claims.summary: Verify an additive 12D glimpse with explicit source and residual lineage while preserving the stable legacy transport.
Verify distinguishability and finite-value audits for the added axes rather than assuming dimensional expansion creates usable texture.
Replacing live transport with 12D or changing codec porosity/gain is Tier 5 protocol and substrate work requiring explicit operator approval.
Compare current and 12D delivery with Astrid-authored material in a bounded replay when a direct runnable adapter exists.
